message:
test(block): add proptest property-based tests for ARC cache invariants

Add 6 proptest property-based tests to ffs-block:

- ARC invariants under random access sequences (resident == t1+t2,
  resident <= capacity, loc map consistency)
- loc map consistent with T1/T2/B1/B2 list membership
- Repeated access to same key always results in cache hit
- Dirty blocks are never evicted from resident map
- Cache capacity is never exceeded (for clean blocks)
- hits + misses equals total number of accesses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
